project.title: Saffron & Co.
project.summary: A premium D2C storefront for an artisanal spice brand — frictionless checkout, rich product storytelling, mobile-first.
project.overview: A family spice business with incredible products wanted to go direct-to-consumer with a store that felt as premium as their packaging — and could launch before the festive season.
project.challenge: They were selling through marketplaces with zero brand control and thin margins. They needed their own high-converting store fast, without a long, expensive build.
project.solution: We built a headless Shopify storefront with cinematic product pages, a one-page Stripe checkout, and an SEO foundation tuned for recipe and ingredient searches. Everything was designed mobile-first, since most of their traffic comes from Instagram.
features: Story-driven product pages with rich imagery
One-page Stripe checkout with express options

testimonial.quote: We launched in three weeks and beat our first-month target by the second week. The store finally looks like our brand deserves.
testimonial.author: Founder, Saffron & Co.

next.title: Kettle & Kin
next.summary: A booking-driven website for a boutique café chain with live table reservations and a slick, on-brand experience.
next.overview: A growing café chain wanted one beautiful website that captured their cozy brand and let guests book a table in seconds across all their locations.
next.challenge: Reservations were handled over the phone and DMs, which meant missed bookings and a frustrating experience. Their old site was slow, dated, and didn't reflect the in-store vibe.
next.solution: We designed a warm, photography-led site in React and Tailwind, then wired up a live bookings API so guests can reserve a table by location in real time. Menus and events update through a simple content layer the team manages themselves.

testimonial.quote: Bookings now run on autopilot and the site actually feels like walking into one of our cafés. Our staff got their phones back.
testimonial.author: Operations Lead, Kettle & Kin
